extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won flat sprint stage via Alpecin team protecting him through final 10km, enabling zero accelerations until 200m
tactical_patterns: Alpecin executed perfect positioning through final 10km keeping Groves protected until 200m, preventing premature energy expenditure.
Van Poppel boxed in mid-sprint, forced to smash bars/elbows to create gap, lost momentum compared to free-wheeling Groves.
UAE's Digne Milano pulled too early for teammate, creating acceleration gap Groves exploited in final pedal strokes.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Demonstrated sprint acceleration nobody could match once launched, suggesting upside in positioning-dependent finishes
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: negative: Had superior speed last 100m but poor positioning/boxing negated raw power advantage
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Abandoned race, removing road captain protection for Evenepoel in mountain stages ahead
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: neutral: Mentioned as possibility after rest day but invisible in finale
